response.justification: The candidate has strong experience in distributed systems, AI-driven development, and technical strategy, aligning well with the job requirements. Their background in full-stack engineering and experience with AI-agent infrastructure are significant strengths.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-driven development and agentic workflows
Strong background in full-stack engineering with diverse technologies
Technical strategy and leadership experience at re:cinq
concerns: Limited direct experience in high-throughput, distributed systems design
German language skills are basic, which might be a concern for stakeholder management
No explicit mention of experience with on-call rotations or incident response
